name: Tapioca Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the egg.
2. Mix egg yolk, milk, sugar, tapioca, and salt in a saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture boils for 3 minutes.
4. Cool, stir in vanilla.
5. Beat egg white until foamy, beating constantly.
6. Add remaining sugar a little at a time.
7. Beat egg white until stiff.
8. Fold beaten egg white into pudding.
9. Chill and serve.
